title: Chobits GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off Chobits.
body:
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chobits-gui-pack)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chobits-gui-pack)

[![website](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/website_vector.svg)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga Chobits. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the lovable chobits and of course Chi's boyfriend Hideki.

# Previews - Check the Gallery for more!
![Large Chest Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLRvoV0h/images/b5cc8f3d8ddbb882a459ee96428dba69f236dd54.png)
![Anvil Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLRvoV0h/images/894d2a88800e43f8f594e09200f349ebc1fa8ef9.png)
![Smithing Table Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLRvoV0h/images/0ef9f0a344de38686e27b6b8a3703a7868cdde17.png)

[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/39e1d151-f787-4346-9014-f14dc996f94e.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
